Inputs: raw 46-134 expanded design-strategy family (51 entries) + narrow-scope 3-paradigm pool (P1/P2/P3) + 8-paradigm sibling pool (S1..S8) = 51+3+8 = 62 prior reference entries (S1=P-S6 등 일부 overlap 있어 distinct entries 더 적음). NO new raw/own registration, NO tool/*.hexa edit, NO atlas shard edit, NO commit.

axis_a.rationale: raw 46-134 family (51 entries) + P+Q+R narrow scope + S1..S8 sibling octuple 모두 외부에서 ONE single paradigm enumeration. axis_a 는 'WHICH single paradigm' — 'HOW STRONG novelty-falsifier 3-tuple' (axis_b) 와 'whether NON-OVERLAP w/ 3 prior pools' (axis_c) 와 직교. α envelope 'apply 5 weak falsifier batch' motif 의 dual = single strong = N=1 narrow.

candidate_paradigm.novel_contribution_vs_prior_pool: raw 113 Bayesian 은 CLASSICAL real commutative ring (+, ×) 위 prior×likelihood multiplicative algebra. P1 quantum-amplitude (narrow-scope) 는 complex non-commutative ring. T1 tropical 은 IDEMPOTENT SEMIRING (min, +) — additive inverse axiom 자체 부재 (semiring ≠ ring); a⊕a = min(a,a) = a (idempotency, a+a=2a≠a 위반); zero element = +∞ (multiplicative absorbing, ring 의 0 와 다름); ⊗=+ classical addition 이 semiring multiplication. raw 130 Pareto (partial-order set on multi-objective) 는 set-of-non-dominated-points, tropical 은 binary algebra a⊕b. raw 134 quotient-canonical 의 quotient motif 는 equivalence relation, tropical 의 dequantization 은 limit ℏ→0 또는 t→∞ 에서의 algebra-degeneration (limit operation). S4 LDP (large-deviation rate function) 가 tropical/Maslov 와 가까운 후보 — rate function I(x)=lim −(1/n) log P(X_n≈x) 가 (min, +) 형식이나 LDP 는 'tail exponent 정량', tropical 은 'algebra 자체 (모든 + 를 min 으로 dequantize)' — operational difference: LDP 는 single-sequence asymptotic, tropical 은 full-algebra-replacement.
candidate_paradigm.primary_mechanism: set ℝ_max = ℝ ∪ {-∞}; ⊕ = max (또는 ⊕=min for ℝ_min = ℝ ∪ {+∞}); ⊗ = +; (ℝ_max, ⊕, ⊗) 는 commutative idempotent semiring; zero of ⊕ = -∞ (additively absorbing for max); identity of ⊗ = 0; tropical polynomial p(x) = a_0 ⊗ x^{⊗0} ⊕ a_1 ⊗ x^{⊗1} ⊕ ... ⊕ a_n ⊗ x^{⊗n} = max_i (a_i + i·x); tropicalization map Trop: V(f) → V(trop(f)) (algebraic variety → polyhedral fan); Maslov dequantization ℏ→0: classical Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman PDE 의 solution 이 (min, +) algebra 위 propagation; Bellman-Ford shortest-path = (n-1)-fold min-plus matrix multiply (D^{(k)})_ij = min_l(D^{(k-1)}_il + W_lj).
candidate_paradigm.primary_existing_raw_anchor: raw 113 (bayesian — commutative real ring, idempotent semiring 부재) + raw 130 (pareto-multi-objective — partial-order set, binary semiring algebra 부재) + raw 134 (quotient-canonical — equivalence-quotient, dequantization-limit 부재) + S4 LDP (sibling pool — rate function asymptotic, full-algebra replacement 부재)
candidate_paradigm.raw_126_self_host_stability_declaration: k_step_byte_eq_witness=YES (Bellman-Ford min-plus matrix multiplication 은 finite k-step convergence — graph diameter D 후 fixpoint, byte-eq); k_step_classifier_pass_witness=YES (tropicalization map Trop: V→V_trop 의 deterministic computation k=2 selftest: 동일 polynomial 의 tropicalization 두 번 → 동일 polyhedral fan); divergence_tolerance_if_unbounded=YES (negative-cycle 존재 시 −∞ propagation — explicit divergence tolerance, raw 126 unbounded-allowed branch); n_step_general_bound=O(n³) Floyd-Warshall min-plus closure / O(VE) Bellman-Ford / O(deg(p)·n) tropical polynomial evaluation; fixpoint_or_oscillation_classification=fixpoint (Kleene-star A* = ⊕_{k=0..∞} A^{⊗k} 가 idempotent semiring 위 well-defined fixpoint when no negative cycle; negative-cycle 시 oscillation→divergence)
cognitive_frameworks_cited: Maslov 1986 idempotent dequantization (Mat. Sb. — semiclassical limit ℏ→0 위 (min, +) algebra emergence)
Viro 2002 tropicalization ICM Beijing lecture (tropical geometry as polyhedral fan limit of algebraic varieties)
Cuninghame-Green 1979 'Minimax Algebra' Springer LNEMS 166 (max-plus algebra for industrial path scheduling, predates Maslov in operations research)
Litvinov-Maslov-Shpiz 2007 'Idempotent Mathematics and Mathematical Physics' AMS Contemporary Mathematics 377 (idempotent semiring 위 functional analysis)
realization_channels: Bellman-Ford min-plus matrix multiplication for shortest-path / dynamic-programming design propagation (cognitive frame: classical CS algorithm)
tropical polynomial / tropical curve degeneration of algebraic variety (cognitive frame: algebraic geometry — Mikhalkin enumeration of tropical curves)
Maslov dequantization solving Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman PDE via (min, +) propagation (cognitive frame: optimal control / variational analysis)

max-plus / min-plus eigenvalue + eigenvector spectral theory for cycle-time analysis in discrete-event systems (cognitive frame: industrial scheduling — Cuninghame-Green / Heidergott-Olsder-van der Woude 'Max Plus at Work' 2006)
candidate_paradigm.counter_example_where_not_applicable: design with ESSENTIAL additive-inverse / negation requirement (e.g., signed measure, complex amplitude, Bayes-update with subtractive evidence, raw 110 ablation 의 destructive-removal subtractive semantics) — tropical (min, +) 에 ⊕-inverse 부재 (min(a, ?) = identity ⇒ ? = -∞, but min(a, -∞) = -∞ ≠ identity); subtraction 연산 자체 표현 불가. 또한 design 이 NON-ASYMPTOTIC scope 인 경우 (Maslov dequantization 은 ℏ→0 또는 t→∞ limit) — short-time / non-degenerate regime 에서는 tropical algebra 가 over-aggressive simplification.

novelty_falsifier_triple.algebraic_or_structural_mismatch_kind: real-commutative-ring-vs-idempotent-semiring (additive-inverse-axiom-violation: a⊕a=a idempotency; zero-element-shift: ring-0 vs semiring-(-∞) absorbing)
novelty_falsifier_triple.absorption_test_negative_result: raw 113 'evidence_combiner' field 에 'min_plus_semiring' 추가 시 ring axiom (additive inverses ∀a∃-a: a+(-a)=0) 가 (min, +) 에서 위반 — min(a, -∞) = -∞ ≠ 0 (ring 의 0); 또한 a⊕a = min(a,a) = a (idempotency) 가 ring + 의 a+a=2a 와 distinct algebra; slug-suffix 'bayesian-tropical' 시도 시 raw 106 genus mandate 위반 (Maslov 1986 dequantization / Viro 2002 tropicalization / Cuninghame-Green 1979 max-plus 가 Bayes 위 species 아닌 distinct genus — semiring 자체가 ring 의 대체 algebra). raw 130 Pareto 의 partial-order set 흡수 시 tropical (min, +) 의 algebra-on-elements 가 Pareto-set-on-pairs 와 차원 mismatch — Pareto 는 'set of non-dominated points' (subset of vector space), tropical 는 'binary algebra a⊕b=min(a,b)' (binary operation on scalars); slug-suffix 'pareto-tropical' 시도 시 multi-objective vector vs scalar idempotent algebra 의 arity-mismatch. raw 134 quotient-canonical 흡수 시 quotient (equivalence relation) 가 dequantization (limit operation, ℏ→0) 와 distinct — quotient 는 set/category 차원, dequantization 은 algebra-degeneration 차원.
false_positive_candidate_raw_set: raw 113 (design-bayesian-evidence-accumulation — closest as 'aggregation algebra over evidence' but commutative real ring; absorption FAIL by ring-vs-semiring axiom mismatch)
raw 130 (design-pareto-multi-objective — closest as 'optimization formalism' but partial-order set on vectors; absorption FAIL by set-vs-binary-algebra arity mismatch)

raw 119 (design-temporal-decay-monotone — closest as 'DP-style propagation overlap' since Bellman-Ford 가 monotonic in (min, +) but raw 119 deterministic recurrence on real values; absorption FAIL by lacking idempotent semiring axiom + lacking tropicalization map)

raw 134 (design-quotient-canonical-form — closest as 'tropicalization=degeneration limit motif' since dequantization is sometimes thought of as quotient under limit; absorption FAIL by quotient=equivalence-relation vs dequantization=algebra-degeneration limit ℏ→0; quotient operates on objects, dequantization operates on algebra structure itself)

axis_a.correlation_with_other_axes_estimate: axis_a × axis_b ≈ 0.45 (paradigm 본문에 falsifier 포함되어 약하게 의존하나 3-tuple deterministic-test schema 자체는 별도 axis); axis_a × axis_c ≈ 0.40 (paradigm 의 algebraic mismatch claim 이 cross-non-overlap witness 의 일부와 어휘 공유 — algebraic mismatch typed enum)

axis_b.rationale: user prompt 'single falsifier triple' 충족 — 4-tuple narrow-scope 보다 한 단계 더 conservative 한 3-tuple typed schema. (a) algebraic_or_structural_mismatch_kind (typed enum), (b) absorption_test_negative_result (str — 왜 absorb 불가능, 4 false-positive 후보 모두 reject 이유), (c) false_positive_candidate_raw_set (array of raw_id+rationale — 어떤 existing raw 이 false-positive 후보였는지 명시). raw 53 deterministic verifier 정신 (LLM judge 우회). axis_b 는 'HOW STRONG single novelty-falsifier 3-tuple' — axis_a 의 paradigm 자체와 axis_c 의 cross-non-overlap 와 직교. α envelope 'falsifier-batch dual = single-strong-falsifier' motif 와 직접 align.

raw_117_sub_1_genus_naming.rationale: no -via/-with/-vendor species suffix; -tropical-min-plus 는 algebraic-system anchor (semiring (ℝ_max, max, +) 또는 (ℝ_min, min, +)); -maslov-dequantization 은 founding-figure historical anchor (Maslov 1986); raw 106 ban list (-via/-with/-api/-sdk/-tool/-cli/-daemon/-script) 와 distinct. cognitive-framework 의 algebraic-anchor 명명 (semiring 자체 + Maslov dequantization motif) 은 genus-level identifier.

raw_117_sub_4_counter_example.counter_example_summary: design with essential additive-inverse / negation (signed measure, complex amplitude, subtractive Bayes update, raw 110 ablation destructive-removal) — tropical 에 ⊕-inverse 부재 (no subtraction); 또는 NON-ASYMPTOTIC scope (Maslov dequantization 은 ℏ→0 limit, short-time regime 에서 over-aggressive)

raw_117_sub_5_novelty_falsifier_3_tuple_.strength_grade: STRONG (idempotent-semiring vs ring algebra mismatch — additive-inverse axiom violated + a⊕a=a idempotency; deterministic semiring-axiom-violation test; raw 113/130/119/134 모두 absorption FAIL evidence — 4 false-positive 후보 reject)

axis_b.deterministic_verifier_class: schema_validate (typed enum + str procedure + array-of-{raw_id, rationale}) — LLM judge 우회 (raw 53 정신). 향후 tool/novelty_falsifier_lint.hexa 구현 시 3-tuple schema check + false_positive_set absorption-test 자동 실행 가능.
axis_b.correlation_with_other_axes_estimate: axis_b × axis_a ≈ 0.45 (3-tuple schema 검증은 paradigm 본문 내장이지만 axis_b 는 schema-presence test 에 집중); axis_b × axis_c ≈ 0.30 (3-tuple 는 paradigm 단일 entry 의 falsifier 형식, axis_c 는 prior-pool-set non-overlap pairwise — 구조적 distinct)

axis_c.rationale: single-candidate scope (N=1) 가 prior pool (raw 46-134 family + P+Q+R + S1-S8) 의 cross-non-overlap 을 명시 입증할 책임. 3 sub-block (vs raw 46-134 family entries / vs PQR narrow scope / vs S1-S8 sibling octuple) 각각 structural_mismatch_witness + verdict NON_OVERLAP 명시. β bias byte 62 mod 3=2 → axis_c hot-path. axis_c 는 'whether T1 is truly NON-OVERLAP w/ all 3 prior pools' — axis_a (which T1) 와 axis_b (HOW STRONG 3-tuple) 와 직교. user prompt 'beyond raw 46-134 P+Q+R family' 의 'beyond' 책임의 backbone.

vs_raw_46_134_family.prior_set_summary: 51 entries (raw 46-134) — phase coverage map 에서 STRATEGIC_RATIONALITY (raw 127), RG_SCALE_INVARIANCE (raw 128), DIFFERENTIAL_PRIVACY (raw 129), PARETO_MULTI_OBJECTIVE (raw 130), THERMODYNAMIC_LANDAUER (raw 131), OPERADIC_HIGHER_CAT (raw 132), PREDICTIVE_CODING_FEP (raw 133), QUOTIENT_CANONICAL_FORM (raw 134) 8 newly-added + raw 46-126 35 prior phases. 가장 가까운 후보: raw 113 (Bayesian — aggregation algebra), raw 130 (Pareto — optimization), raw 119 (temporal-decay — DP-style monotone), raw 134 (quotient — equivalence/limit motif).
vs_raw_46_134_family.structural_mismatch_witness: ring-vs-idempotent-semiring (typed enum: distinct-algebraic-system) — 51 entries 중 어떤 것도 idempotent semiring (a⊕a=a) algebra 를 primary mechanism 으로 선언 안 함; raw 113 commutative real ring (additive inverses 존재), raw 130 partial-order set on vectors (binary algebra 아닌 set-on-vectors), raw 119 deterministic real-valued recurrence (no idempotency), raw 134 equivalence-quotient (set/category 차원). 4 closest 후보 모두 absorption FAIL — 본 cycle axis_a.candidate_paradigm.novelty_falsifier_triple.absorption_test_negative_result 명시.

vs_PQR_narrow_scope.prior_set_summary: narrow-scope cycle 의 P1 (quantum-amplitude-grover-feynman, S6 of sibling octuple) + P2 (type-theory-curry-howard, S2) + P3 (do-calculus-instrumental-variable, S7).
vs_PQR_narrow_scope.structural_mismatch_witness: (typed enum: cross-domain) — P1 은 complex non-commutative ring (quantum amplitude); P2 는 syntactic proof tree term reduction (lambda calculus); P3 는 interventional do-operator algebraic reduction (3 Pearl rules). T1 tropical 은 idempotent semiring (min, +) 위 binary algebra. P1/P2/P3 vs T1 모두 PRIMARY algebraic structure mismatch — ring (P1) / type-theoretic syntactic (P2) / interventional do-symbol (P3) / idempotent semiring (T1) 4 distinct algebra. 특히 P1 (complex commutative) vs T1 (real idempotent): P1 의 superposition |α+β|² ≠ |α|²+|β|² 와 T1 의 a⊕a=a 가 directly distinct (interference cross-term 2Re(αβ̄) ≠ idempotent collapse).

vs_S1_S8_sibling_octuple.prior_set_summary: sibling 8-paradigm cycle 의 S1 (ergodic / Birkhoff) + S2 (type-theory) + S3 (info-geometry / Fisher) + S4 (LDP / Cramér-Sanov) + S5 (spectral-graph / Cheeger) + S6 (quantum-amplitude / Grover) + S7 (do-calculus) + S8 (stochastic-DE / Itô).
vs_S1_S8_sibling_octuple.structural_mismatch_witness: (typed enum: distinct-algebraic-system OR cross-domain) — S1 ergodic 은 measure-theoretic ensemble/time-average (real number arithmetic, ring); S2 type-theory 는 syntactic proof; S3 info-geometry 는 Riemannian manifold + Fisher metric (smooth manifold geometry, ring); S4 LDP 은 rate function asymptotic (real-valued I(x), ring); S5 spectral-graph 은 eigenvalue spectrum (linear algebra, ring); S6 quantum-amplitude 은 complex non-commutative ring; S7 do-calculus 는 interventional symbol; S8 Itô 는 stochastic real-valued differential equation (ring + stochastic perturbation). T1 tropical 은 idempotent semiring (no ring axiom). 가장 가까운 후보: S4 LDP 의 rate function lim −(1/n) log P 가 (min, +) 형식 등장 — 그러나 LDP 는 'tail exponent 정량 single sequence asymptotic', tropical 은 'full-algebra-replacement (ring → semiring)'; absorption FAIL — operational difference: S4 는 specific limit theorem, T1 은 algebra-level structural change.
vs_S1_S8_sibling_octuple.closest_overlap_candidate: S4 LDP — rate function limit form 이 (min, +) shape 에 가까우나 algebra-replacement vs limit-asymptotic dimension 차이로 NON_OVERLAP 유지

axis_c.correlation_with_other_axes_estimate: axis_c × axis_a ≈ 0.40 (axis_c 의 cross-non-overlap 검증은 axis_a paradigm 본문 위 구조 분석 — 어휘 공유 'algebraic mismatch'); axis_c × axis_b ≈ 0.30 (cross-non-overlap 분석과 each-strong novelty-falsifier 가 모두 typed enum 사용 — 어휘 공유, 그러나 axis_c 는 prior-pool-vs-T1 pairwise, axis_b 는 falsifier 3-tuple schema 자체)

fan_out.correlation_estimate: axis_a×b≈0.45 / axis_a×c≈0.40 / axis_b×c≈0.30 — all pairwise < 0.7 (raw 48 multi-axis orthogonal mandate 충족). axis_a 는 'WHICH single T1 paradigm', axis_b 는 'HOW STRONG single novelty-falsifier 3-tuple (deterministic schema)', axis_c 는 'whether T1 NON-OVERLAP w/ raw 46-134 + P+Q+R + S1-S8 (3 prior pools)'.

axes_surfaced.name: single novel paradigm enumeration (N=1) — DEPTH-only conservative dual of narrow-3-paradigm cycle
options_considered: A. 'Pick algorithmic-information-theory / Solomonoff induction (incomputable universal prior K(x)=min{|p|:U(p)=x})' (rejected: closest-existing-raw 후보가 raw 113 Bayesian 이지만 universal prior 가 incomputable — 'computable verification' 관점에서 raw 53 deterministic verifier 정신과 partial-tension; tropical 이 fully-computable algebra 라 deterministic-test 우위)
B. 'Pick free-energy-principle / active-inference (Friston 2010)' (rejected: raw 133 PREDICTIVE_CODING_FEP 가 이미 absorbed — sibling cycle 의 R7 absorbed entry; novelty 부재)

C. 'Pick tropical-geometry / min-plus algebra / Maslov-Viro dequantization — idempotent semiring (a⊕a=a) algebra 위 (min, +) binary operations; raw 113 commutative real ring 와 algebraic distinct (additive-inverse axiom 부재); raw 130 Pareto partial-order set 와 arity distinct; raw 119 temporal-decay deterministic recurrence 와 algebra-level distinct; raw 134 quotient-canonical 과 dequantization-vs-equivalence-quotient 차원 distinct; S4 LDP rate function 의 (min, +) shape 와 가까우나 LDP 는 limit 정량, tropical 은 algebra 자체' (chosen: F1 single + F2 3-tuple novelty-falsifier + F5 cross-non-overlap; 4 false-positive 후보 모두 absorption FAIL 명시 가능; deterministic-verifier 가 semiring-axiom-violation 으로 schema-level)

D. 'Pick linear-logic / resource-aware proof system (Girard 1987)' (rejected: P2 type-theory-curry-howard 와 너무 가까운 후보 — distinct cognitive framework 이지만 'syntactic proof system' 영역 overlap; F5 vs_PQR_narrow_scope 책임 충족 어려움; tropical 이 quantum/type-theory/do-calculus 모두와 algebraic distinct 가 강함)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — design-strategy-tropical-min-plus-maslov-dequantization 단일 후보. (min, +) idempotent semiring 위 binary algebra; Maslov 1986 dequantization + Viro 2002 tropicalization + Cuninghame-Green 1979 max-plus + Litvinov-Maslov-Shpiz 2007 idempotent mathematics 4 cognitive frameworks; Bellman-Ford / tropical polynomial / HJB-PDE / max-plus eigenvalue 4 realization channels.
axes_surfaced.rationale: α envelope (apply-5-weak-falsifier-batch motif) 의 dual = single-strong falsifier — N=1 single + 3-tuple novelty-falsifier strong-form. β byte 62 mod 3=2 → axis_c hot-path (cross-non-overlap 우선) 와 정렬. γ envelope (uniprot-bridge biological pathway motif) → realization channel Bellman-Ford min-plus 가 metabolic pathway 응용 — direct align. F5 cross-non-overlap 책임은 prior pool (raw 46-134 + P+Q+R + S1-S8) 모두에서 algebraic-system-distinct typed enum 으로 입증; closest 후보 raw 113/130/119/134 + S4 LDP 4-5개 모두 absorption FAIL 명시.

axes_surfaced.name: raw 117 sub-rule (5) novelty-falsifier 를 3-tuple typed schema (a/b/c) 로 strong-form 명시 — single falsifier triple strict
options_considered: A. 'novelty-falsifier 를 prose 만으로 명시 (sibling cycle 일반 form)' (rejected: user prompt 'single falsifier triple' strict — prose-only 은 raw 53 deterministic verifier 정신 위반)

B. 'narrow-scope cycle 의 4-tuple (algebraic_or_structural_mismatch_kind / closest_existing_raw_id / deterministic_mismatch_test / absorption_test_negative_result)' (rejected: user prompt 'single falsifier triple' 명시적 — 4-tuple 은 over-specification; closest_existing_raw_id 와 deterministic_mismatch_test 를 absorption_test_negative_result 본문에 포함시키고 false_positive_candidate_raw_set 으로 array 화 → 3-tuple)

C. '3-tuple typed novelty-falsifier — (a) algebraic_or_structural_mismatch_kind enum / (b) absorption_test_negative_result str (deterministic test 절차 + 모든 false-positive 후보 reject 이유 통합) / (c) false_positive_candidate_raw_set array of {raw_id, rationale} — schema-level 검증 가능, LLM judge 우회' (chosen: F2 mandate 충족; raw 53 deterministic verifier + raw 73 verify-then-seal 정신 일치; user prompt 'single falsifier triple' strict)

D. '2-tuple — algebraic_mismatch + non-absorbability 만 (false_positive set 생략)' (rejected: false-positive set 명시는 'novelty 가 어떤 existing raw 가 false-positive 후보였는지' 의 책임 — 명시 없으면 absorption_test 의 ambiguity 증가; 3-tuple 가 minimum sufficient quality)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — 3-tuple typed novelty-falsifier_triple (algebraic_or_structural_mismatch_kind enum / absorption_test_negative_result str / false_positive_candidate_raw_set array). T1 tropical paradigm 의 novelty-falsifier 가 schema-level 검증 가능 (4 false-positive 후보 raw_set 명시 — raw 113/130/119/134 모두 absorption FAIL 이유 enumerated).
axes_surfaced.rationale: user prompt 'single falsifier triple' strict 충족 — narrow-scope cycle 의 4-tuple 보다 한 단계 더 conservative. raw 53 deterministic verifier 정신 — LLM judge 우회 (typed enum + str procedure + array of {raw_id, rationale}). raw 73 verify-then-seal — 등록 시점 schema 검증 가능. α envelope 'apply 5 weak falsifier batch' motif 의 dual = single-strong-3-tuple — quantity (5 weak) ↔ depth (1 strong 3-tuple).

axes_surfaced.name: T1 paradigm 이 raw 46-134 family + P+Q+R + S1-S8 sibling octuple 3 prior pools 모두와 NON_OVERLAP 임을 입증
options_considered: A. 'cross-non-overlap 검증 안 함 (axis_c 생략)' (rejected: user prompt 'beyond raw 46-134 P+Q+R family' 의 'beyond' 책임 — 본 cycle 의 backbone; axis_c 부재 시 'novel beyond prior' 입증 안 됨)
B. 'vs raw 46-134 family 만 검증 (P+Q+R 와 S1-S8 생략)' (rejected: P+Q+R 와 S1-S8 도 prior reference set — 본 cycle 의 carry_forward_origin 명시; 모두 검증 책임)

C. '3 sub-block (vs raw 46-134 / vs PQR / vs S1-S8) 각각 prior_set_summary + structural_mismatch_witness with typed enum + verdict NON_OVERLAP + closest_overlap_candidate identification' (chosen: F5 mandate 충족; β byte 62 mod 3=2 → axis_c hot-path; user prompt 'beyond' backbone)

D. 'all-vs-all matrix — raw 46-134 의 51 entries 각각 + P+Q+R 3 entries 각각 + S1-S8 8 entries 각각 = 62-cell matrix' (rejected: pool-level summary + closest 후보 4-5개만 명시 가능 — 51 entries 전체 enumeration 은 over-engineering, 본 cycle scope 외; F5 strict 는 3 sub-block 만 요구)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — 3 sub-block (vs_raw_46_134_family / vs_PQR_narrow_scope / vs_S1_S8_sibling_octuple) 각각 4 sub-keys (prior_set_summary / structural_mismatch_witness / verdict / closest_overlap_candidate or similar) 채움. all_3_blocks_non_overlap=true.
axes_surfaced.rationale: user prompt 'beyond raw 46-134 P+Q+R family' 충족. β byte 62 mod 3=2 → axis_c hot-path. typed enum {distinct-algebraic-system, cross-domain} schema-level 검증 가능 (LLM judge 우회). closest_overlap_candidate identification (raw 113/130/119/134 + S4 LDP) 이 false_positive set 와 직접 cross-link.
